title: Prediction Is Not Care
prompt: Ask what action follows the output, who performs it, and whether it improves patient or population outcomes.

title: The Record Is Not the Patient
prompt: Review missingness, access barriers, documentation bias, and proxy labels before treating data as health reality.

title: Health Algorithms Need Stop Rules
prompt: Check whether unsafe, inequitable, or clinically unhelpful systems can be paused, limited, rolled back, or retired.
